prompt: Create a vertical 9:16 high-resolution anime idol illustration of a cheerful blonde magical idol girl posing cutely in a room where the floor, walls, and ceiling are entirely covered in mirror panels. Use a dramatic low-angle perspective with strong wide-angle depth, making the character appear close to the viewer while her reflections repeat into the background on every side. The character has long flowing golden blonde hair with curled ends, a large translucent blue bow on top, and a sparkling blue-and-white stage costume. Outfit details: exactly 8 main visible outfit pieces — 1 large hair bow, 1 glittering blue corset bodice, 1 layered short frilly skirt with translucent overskirt, 2 white gloves, 2 white knee-high boots, and 1 small waist bow. Pose: she balances on one leg, one knee lifted, one hand making a V-sign toward the viewer and the other hand pointing near her face in a playful idol gesture. The face area is intentionally covered by a plain skin-tone rectangular block, while the rest of the illustration remains highly detailed. The mirrored room should show many reflections of the same character from different angles, with visible reflected copies behind her and to both sides. Lighting is bright, icy blue, and magical, with countless star-like sparkles, lens flares, glitter particles, and crystalline highlights bouncing across the mirror seams. Visual style: polished Japanese anime key visual, glossy idol-card aesthetic, delicate line art, luminous blue palette, shimmering fabric texture, intricate ruffles and bows, dynamic composition, ultra-detailed reflections, no text, no watermark.
